tasks.label: Docker: Compile
tasks.command: docker run --rm -v "${workspaceFolder}":/workspace server-room-monitoring-system sh -c "cmake --preset Debug && cmake --build --preset Debug"

tasks.label: Flash
tasks.command: openocd -f interface/stlink.cfg -f target/stm32f4x.cfg -c "program build/Debug/server-room-monitoring-system.elf verify reset exit"

tasks.label: Docker: Clean
tasks.command: docker run --rm -v "${workspaceFolder}":/workspace server-room-monitoring-system sh -c "cmake --build --preset Debug --target clean"

tasks.label: Docker: Test
tasks.command: docker run --rm -v "${workspaceFolder}":/workspace server-room-monitoring-system sh -c "cmake -B tests/build -S tests && cmake --build tests/build && cd tests/build && ctest --output-on-failure"
